data.name: No-good Streamer Mirai-chan! (Now accepting lewd comments)
data.detailed_description:
[Story]

The protagonist is a university student busy juggling part-time jobs.

They don’t have any major complaints about life—but something still feels a little lacking.

Living alone, which once seemed so exciting, has turned out to be surprisingly dull.

“I wish every day could be a little more fun…”

Then, a shy girl moves into the apartment next door.

There’s Mirai-chan, a streamer who actually knows who you are.

And her friend, Yukari-chan.

Meeting these girls begins to change your life in unexpected ways.

[Spicy Communication with a Streamer]

Get flirty and playful with the slightly clumsy streamer, Mirai-chan, and spice up her livestreams!

Saying things like "Show me your boobs" or even lewd comments is totally okay!

In fact, the more excited she gets, the more likely she’ll extend her stream—and maybe even offer some special services just for you.

[Features]

[Send DM s]
Once you get close to Mirai-chan, she’ll start messaging you personally.
Messages like “I’m going live soon—come watch!”
Sometimes, she might even send you naughty selfies she wouldn’t show anyone else...

[Part-Time Job]
Earn money by working part-time, so you can support Mirai-chan using the UltraChat feature.
While working, you might even run into one of the heroines in real life!

[Results Screen]
After each stream ends, you’ll get a results screen.
Previously viewed streams can be replayed—aim for that perfect S-Rank!

[ASMR]
Enjoy high-quality ASMR streams recorded with the KU-100 mic!
Not a fan of ASMR tickles in your ears? Don’t worry—there’s a handy skip function for that too.

[From Online Streams to Real-Life Intimacy]

Get close enough to Mirai-chan, and you’ll be able to meet her in person—and do all sorts of naughty things.

Everyone’s favorite streamer, Mirai-chan, becomes yours and yours alone.

[Character Introductions]

[Recommended for You If You…]

→ Love watching livestreams by content creators
→ Love girls who are super into sexy stuff
→ Get excited by girls who love being watched
→ Enjoy asking naughty questions
→ Like clumsy big-breasted characters
→ Prefer devoted, proactive girls
→ Enjoy erotic games with a bright, comical atmosphere

data.short_description: Chat and play with a cute streamer girl!(Almost fully voiced) Flirt with clumsy streamer Mirai-chan and spice up her stream! Even saying things like "Show me your boobs" is totally okay. The more excited she gets, the longer the stream—and maybe you’ll get some special services, too…
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: This work is made with RPG Maker MZ（Nwjs/HTML5）.　*Keyboard and mouse required.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-2120 3.30GHz or better
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: This work is made with RPG Maker MZ（Nwjs/HTML5）.　*Keyboard and mouse required.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: This work is made with RPG Maker MZ（Nwjs/HTML5）.　*Keyboard and mouse required.
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-2120 3.30GHz or better
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: This work is made with RPG Maker MZ（Nwjs/HTML5）.　*Keyboard and mouse required.
